name: Daybreak
description: Rays of light fanning out of the top-left corner — every redraw sweeps the beams to new angles and lengths, like dawn through a window.

code.style: --ray: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --rule: ( @place-cell: 0 0; @size: 200% 1.5px; background: var(--ray); opacity: @rand(0.2, 1); transform: rotate(@rand(1deg, 89deg)) translateX(@rand(-12%, 25%)) scaleX(@rand(0.35, 1)); transition: ease 700ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: 1x${rays}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
